business: BounceBan (Verify risky emails without sending messages)

lead.business: BounceBan (Verify risky emails without sending messages)
lead.description: BounceBan verifies all kinds of emails and shines at verifying emails that are accept-all or protected by SEGs (Secure Email Gateway) and greylisting. We don't simply mark all accept-alls as risky like others do - we help you identify those that are deliverable indeed while achieving excellent overall delivery rates. Uncover true deliverability for accept-alls Not all accept-alls are risky. Powered by proprietary algorithms, BounceBan is the only solution that can reliably verify the true deliverability for more than 50% emails that are accept-all or protected by SEGs (Secure Email Gateway).
